message.content:
Navigate to the card-place repository at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place and get the exact content of the orderDetail service files from the feature/SPMAIS-32275_ branch.

Run these commands:
1. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/store/rewardProgram/services/orderDetail.service.ts
2. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/store/rewardProgram/store/orderDetail.store.ts
3. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/store/rewardProgram/models/orderDetail.model.ts
4. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/store/rewardProgram/api/orderDetail.api.ts
5. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/store/rewardProgram/repository/orderDetail.repository.ts

Return the COMPLETE content of each file.

input.command: cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git fetch origin feature/SPMAIS-32275_ 2>/dev/null; git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/store/rewardProgram/services/orderDetail.service.ts 2>&1
input.description: Fetch branch and show orderDetail.service.ts from feature/SPMAIS-32275_ branch
